message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Min and Max primitives

Adds 32 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Basic comparison (scalar values)
- Equal values
- Negative values
- Zero handling
- Infinity (positive and negative)
- NaN handling (IEEE 754-2008 minNum/maxNum semantics)
- Integer support (i64)
- 1D tensor shapes
- Mathematical relationships:
  - min(a,b) + max(a,b) = a + b
  - min(a,b) <= max(a,b)

Note: Min/Max use IEEE 754-2008 minNum/maxNum semantics where
NaN operands return the non-NaN value (not NaN propagation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
